series_metadata.series_description: The International Registration Plan (IRP), Article IV, Section 408, requires notifying jurisdictions of apportioned registration applications filed in Ohio. Notification is in the form of IRP Recap/Transmittals print-outs that are monthly reports detailing each commercial truck fleet transaction for each jurisdiction.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: IRP Recap/Transmittal Reports will be retained for the current commercial vehicle registration year plus three previous years records., Paper: Recycle
